rules.rule: replay MUST reconstruct semantic structure, package_sha256, continuity chains, and lineage references end-to-end.
hash mismatch on any linked artifact is fail-closed.
replay MUST be deterministic across invocations; non-determinism is fail-closed.
replay MUST NEVER mutate prior-layer runtime trees, the live publication tree, frontend/theme systems, or source evidence.
replay events are append-only and reviewer-attributed.
